channel.title: AI Skill Gym Insights
channel.description: Practical AI skill-building through real-world application.

item.title: 5 Prompt Mistakes That Kill Output Quality
item.description: Are your AI results feeling generic? The issue is likely in how you structure constraints. We break down the top 5 mistakes and how to fix them instantly.

item.title: Why Most Prompts Fail (And How to Fix Them)
item.description: Turning vague ideas into high-precision prompts is the foundation of AI literacy. Here is the before-and-after of prompt transformations that actually work.
